selectedStarStories.title: Assumed ownership of production HR automation flows after handover
selectedStarStories.situation: Multiple production HR automation flows and related systems risked unclear ownership after a handover from Alex Wu.
selectedStarStories.task: Complete TOI and take over monitoring, troubleshooting, and operational requirements for scheduled HR automation flows.
selectedStarStories.action: Took over flows covering AI Screening, COE PDFs, Japan synchronization, Taiwan attendance import, leave/travel/LOA data, and documented client secret renewal, service account ownership, publish-solution dependency, and manual refresh constraints.
selectedStarStories.result: Preserved continuity of scheduled HR automation operations across Workday, Azure Blob, Dataverse, Jenkins, Synapse, SharePoint, and Power BI after TOI completion.
cvBullets: Assumed operational ownership of production HR automation flows spanning Workday, Azure Blob, Dataverse, Jenkins, Synapse, SharePoint, and Power BI after TOI completion.

selectedStarStories.title: Digitized Legal DPIA workflow with privacy and AI assessment controls
selectedStarStories.situation: Legal's DPIA process was fragmented across Excel and needed stronger tracking, reviewer workflow, and compliance control.
selectedStarStories.task: Design a systematic digital replacement for DPIA and AI impact assessment handling.
selectedStarStories.action: Built a Power App with SharePoint List storage, Power Automate notifications, reviewer workflow, comments, attachments, logs, access management, and role-based controls.
selectedStarStories.result: Upgraded DPIA assessment into a systematic digital workflow for privacy compliance and AI impact tracking, with 12 UI requirements confirmed and 14 staging reviewers enabled.
cvBullets: Digitized a Legal DPIA and AI Impact Assessment process with Power Apps, SharePoint storage, approval notifications, reviewer workflow, role controls, comments, attachments, and audit logging.

selectedStarStories.title: Resolved recruiting automation defects for reliable data synchronization
selectedStarStories.situation: The recruiting synchronization workflow faced data and flow defects that could interrupt or corrupt scheduled updates.
selectedStarStories.task: Stabilize flow behavior so candidate, position, and worker data could sync reliably.
selectedStarStories.action: Fixed Candidate_Skills truncation over 255 characters, foreach limits over 5000 items, non-stop loop issues, missing Position ID cases, and added needed candidate fields.
selectedStarStories.result: Improved reliability of scheduled recruiting data syncs and reduced defects in Workday-to-SharePoint automation.
cvBullets: Improved recruiting automation reliability by resolving truncation, pagination, loop, missing ID, and field synchronization defects in scheduled Workday-to-SharePoint flows.

selectedStarStories.title: Automated SE onboarding learning reminder lifecycle
selectedStarStories.situation: SE onboarding learning reminders were manually tracked and sent across enrollment, phase progression, mentor observation, completion, and exception scenarios.
selectedStarStories.task: Automate lifecycle email reminders using learning progress and employee data.
selectedStarStories.action: Designed six trigger logics, integrated Docebo learning progress and Workday data, used Microsoft Graph API for email sending, added mentor and manager fallback handling, and monitored run history.
selectedStarStories.result: The SE onboarding reminder automation officially rolled out on Apr 23, 2026 and supported reminder handling for approximately 70 SE records in related source evidence.
cvBullets: Designed and implemented lifecycle email automation for SE onboarding using Docebo learning progress, Workday data, Microsoft Graph email delivery, fallback logic, and monitoring routines.

selectedStarStories.title: Created reusable low-code and API engagement documentation
selectedStarStories.situation: Business teams needed clearer guidance for evaluating Power Platform use cases and engaging with internal API providers and consumers.
selectedStarStories.task: Create reusable documentation that supported low-code automation adoption and API engagement.
selectedStarStories.action: Authored Power Automate and Power Apps business scenario evaluation materials, wrote How to Engage with Connect One provider/consumer guidance, and documented ownership, connection reference, environment, and license considerations.
selectedStarStories.result: Established a documentation foundation for repeatable low-code and API adoption across business and IS teams.
cvBullets: Authored low-code automation and API engagement documentation covering Power Platform use-case evaluation, API provider/consumer roles, ownership transfer, connection references, and licensing considerations.

selectedStarStories.title: Built enterprise Copilot adoption visibility for license decisions
selectedStarStories.situation: The company needed visibility into whether licensed users were actually using M365 Copilot and whether license expansion or reduction decisions were justified.
selectedStarStories.task: Build a systematic adoption dashboard that combined usage, license, and user-group data into actionable views.
selectedStarStories.action: Integrated Copilot audit logs, user exports, distribution lists, and license data into Power BI, tracked 24 Copilot applications, and set daily 8 AM refresh with department KPI views.
selectedStarStories.result: Made enterprise AI adoption quantifiable and supported usage-based license, adoption, and training decisions against the IS department active-usage target.
cvBullets: Built an enterprise M365 Copilot adoption dashboard integrating audit logs, user exports, distribution lists, and license data to make AI usage and license value visible.

topRequirementMappings.requirement: Power Apps / Power Automate workflow delivery
